title: USGS Plate Tectonics
description: A USGS source card about plate boundaries, earthquakes, volcanoes, mountains, and Earth structure.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS plate tectonics resources explain how Earth surface plates move and how boundaries relate to earthquakes, volcanoes, mountain building, and seafloor features.
Use this source for cause-and-effect reading and for connecting maps of hazards with geologic processes.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
